/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/gameEngine.dir/libraries/include/shader/shader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gameEngine.dir/libraries/include/mesh/mesh.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gameEngine.dir/libraries/include/render/render.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gameEngine.dir/libraries/include/texture/texture.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gameEngine.dir/libraries/include/camera/camera.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gameEngine.dir/stb_image.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gameEngine.dir/exercises.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gameEngine.dir/glad.c.o -o bin/gameEngine  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libglfw.so.3.3 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLX.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libOpenGL.so
